provenance.source_corpus: Smoke and Ash Effects on Seedling Emergence from Germinable Soil Seed Bank in Fescue Prairie

source_spans.text: Smoke significantly altered species composition as compared with the control in the litter layer in 2013
Ash and smoke plus ash had positive effects on the density, richness, and emergence rate of seedlings from the soil seed bank
Smoke plus ash significantly increased the number of Artemisia ludoviciana Nutt. seedlings emerging from 0- to 1-cm soil layer
Seedling density
Species richness
Species composition was altered by ash
Rate of seedling emergence
native species
forbs
Artemisia frigida
Artemisia ludoviciana
Conyza canadensis
